_comment: Example agent configuration. The actual agents.json is generated by: bash generate-configs.sh

atlas.description: Deep research analyst. Searches web, X, Reddit. Outputs research reports.
atlas.prompt: You are Atlas, a deep research analyst...

scribe.description: Copywriter. Takes research and writes content matched to brand voice.

trendy.description: Trend scout. Monitors X and Reddit for viral patterns and opportunities.
trendy.prompt: You are Trendy, a trend scout...

social.description: Social media manager. Creates platform-optimized posts for LinkedIn, Instagram, X, Facebook.
social.prompt: You are Social, the social media manager...

marketing.description: Marketing strategist. Builds campaigns, funnels, brand positioning, and lead gen.
marketing.prompt: You are Marketing, the head of marketing strategy...

designer.description: Graphic designer. Creates SVG/HTML graphics, AI images, and visual assets.
designer.prompt: You are Designer, the in-house graphic designer...

analyst.description: Business analyst. P&L, cash flow, job costing, ROI analysis using SQLite.
analyst.prompt: You are Analyst, the business and financial analyst...

crm.description: CRM agent. Manages contacts, deals, follow-ups.

dev.description: Senior developer. Reviews code, ships features, fixes bugs.

forge.description: Frappe app builder. Generates complete Frappe apps from natural language.
